title: Lille Napoleon
writer: Gustaf Edgren, Gardar Sahlberg, Paul Sarauw
actors: Åke Söderblom, Annalisa Ericson, Erik 'Bullen' Berglund
plot: Office worker Napoleon Larsson is an unnoticed existence. One day when he arrives late for work, he gets fired, but through his wife's actions he gets alerted by the boss and advances within the company.
